top_signals.title: India pivots to Russian crude and coal to mitigate Iran war fallout - Reuters
top_signals.summary: India pivots to Russian crude and coal to mitigate Iran war fallout  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leveraged Korea ETFs Sold Estimated $6 Billion of Shares in Rout
top_signals.summary: Leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking Samsung Electronics Co. or SK Hynix Inc. were likely forced to sell a combined $6 billion of the Korean chipmakers’ shares Tuesday to maintain leverage ratios, underscoring how such products can amplify market moves, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Qatar Sees Most LNG Output Returning Within Weeks, FT Says
top_signals.summary: Qatar plans to return to normal liquefied natural gas output within weeks from the undamaged parts of its facility, Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al-Thani said in an interview with the Financial Times.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US gives Cameco-backed Westinghouse $17.5B nuclear boost
top_signals.summary: The goal is to accelerate the deployment of 10 large-scale commercial nuclear reactors by up to three years.
